narrative: Australia jobs smash forecasts with 76.3k gains, firming the AUD as the week's G10 leader (+0.559% avg) and keeping RBA hike bets alive; gold lower -0.74%; equities -0.14%; DXY -0.06%; VIX 16.6. AUD/USD jumps to 0.7017, supported by a -60bp carry disadvantage vs USD that the strong data helps offset. USD/JPY holds 163.05 despite BoJ hawkish signals, with a 275bp Fed-BoJ spread sustaining the carry bid. Watch the ECB Rate Decision today at 12:15 UTC.
